title: VERSION-UPDATES.md deprecated but not formally archived -- add redirect and move to T3
description: ~README.md/VERSION-UPDATES.md is classified T3 (deprecated) per WORKSPACE-INVENTORY-CANONICAL.md because ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md is the replacement. However, VERSION-UPDATES.md has not been archived to ~REPORTS/archive/ and still appears in the checklist footer link. Actions: (1) Prepend a redirect notice to VERSION-UPDATES.md pointing to ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md, (2) Move the file to ~REPORTS/archive/VERSION-UPDATES-archived.md, (3) Update the footer link in PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml to point to ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md.
notes: Per T0/T3 hierarchy: VERSION-UPDATES.md is T3 (deprecated/archived). Canonical change history is ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md (T2, agent-curated).
